title: deer-flow.agent.message v1
description: Streaming AI message events emitted by deer-flow's runtime agent message emitter. Two event_types: 'delta' (incremental chunk during streaming) and 'final' (terminal event for one message_id). Per-message_id throttling applies. Emit site: deer-flow/backend/packages/harness/deerflow/bus.py:338 (emit_agent_message_event). Source: /deer-flow/harness.

subject.description: Typically the thread_id, used as CloudEvent subject for partitioning

message_id.description: Unique id for the AI message; used for per-message throttling

event_type.description: 'delta' for streaming chunks, 'final' for the terminal event

is_final.description: True iff this is the terminal event for the message

content_delta.description: New text content since last emit; omitted when empty

content_cumulative.description: All text accumulated for this message so far; omitted when empty

reasoning_content_delta.description: New reasoning/thinking chunk since last emit; omitted when empty

reasoning_content_cumulative.description: All reasoning accumulated so far; omitted when empty

token_usage.description: Token usage from the final chunk; only present on is_final=true

model.description: Model name that produced the message; emitted when available
